description: A student profile card linking to a profile page, displaying a thumbnail photo, a quote, the person's name, their current role, and their course.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: A single profile card for a chemical engineering student.

props.quote: Take advantage of everything the University and department have to offer
props.name: Lucy Sherburn

stories.name: PostgraduateProfile
stories.description: A profile card for a postgraduate student.

props.quote: My experience on the MSc has inspired me to pursue a PhD
props.name: Sruthi Kannel Suresh
props.subhead: Research project: Molecular characterisation of TOP1A mutants in zebrafish linked to DNA damage,

stories.name: Group
stories.description: Multiple profile cards as typically displayed in a grid on a course page.

instances.quote: Your career aspirations won't just be given to you – you have to make important decisions yourself and find out what makes you tick
instances.name: Daniel Smith

instances.quote: The course content is really varied - you learn a lot of really interesting things and there's a lot of avenues that you can go down
instances.name: Thomas Searle
instances.subhead2: MEng Electrical and Electronic Engineering with a Year in Industry

instances.quote: The teaching is brilliant and the support provided is exceptionally helpful
instances.name: Chris Atkinson

notes: The root element is an anchor tag — the entire card is a link. The thumbnail image is wrapped in Drupal classes: .thumb > .media--image--figure > figure.imgcapt > picture > img. The picture element contains multiple source elements for responsive images; the component should render a picture element with appropriate source elements or simplify to a single img. The subhead and subhead2 are wrapped in a single p element together with a br between them. The .profilecard p selector covers both the quote paragraph and the subhead container paragraph.
